name: DarkRift 2
description: Lightweight, open-source .NET multiplayer networking framework for Unity games. Provides a message-passing server architecture suitable for small-to-medium online titles.

seo.title: DarkRift 2 — Game Development Tools
seo.meta_description: DarkRift 2: Lightweight, open-source .NET multiplayer networking framework for Unity games. Provides a message-passing server architecture suitable for small-to

when_to_use: Unity authoritative multiplayer server for small online game
Custom message-passing network layer for a 2D action game
Dedicated server build for a co-op Unity prototype
Open-source networking backend self-hosted to avoid BaaS fees

pros: Lightweight .NET server suited for small indie teams
Open-source Pro tier removed paywall for commercial use
Clean message-passing API easy to pick up
Lower overhead than Mirror for authoritative setups
cons: Development activity has slowed notably in recent years
Documentation trails behind Fish-Net and Mirror
No built-in lag compensation or client prediction
Small community means fewer sample projects online
review.verdict: Solid minimalist server framework, but Fish-Net and Mirror have better momentum in 2025 Unity networking.
review.best_for: Unity indies wanting a simple authoritative server without engine lock-in
review.not_for: Teams needing prediction, rollback, or a large plugin ecosystem
